title: test_space_set_update_name_succeeds: is_null() check passes for missing key
description: Line 2730 in jmap.rs tests: result["updated"][&space_id].is_null(). In serde_json, indexing an Object with a missing key returns &Value::Null, so this assertion passes even if the server dropped space_id from the updated map entirely (returning empty updated AND empty notUpdated). The test would pass for a server bug that silently ignores the update. Fix: assert result["updated"].as_object().unwrap().contains_key(&space_id) instead. Compare with the correct pattern at line 2821 where as_object().unwrap().is_empty() is used for the inverse check.
